Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.filter

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXActiveObjectFilter
    This class is used by applications to provide a means of filtering active objects.
    IXComponentScopeSelectionFilter<o extends IXLibraryObject>
    All custom Scope Plugins needs to implement this interface.
    IXEvaluation<O extends IXEvaluator>
    All custom evaluator plugins will implement from this interface.
    IXEvaluator
    This is a marker base interface for evaluator objects.
    IXFilter
    All custom filters will implement this interface.
    IXHousingScopeSelectionFilter<o extends IXLibraryHousingDefinition>
    All custom Scope Plugins needs to implement this interface.
    IXObjectFilter<O extends IXObject>
    All custom object filters needs to implement this interface.
    IXPropertyFilter<O extends IXObject>
    All custom property filters will implement this interface.
    IXScopeFilter
    All custom Scope filters will implement this interface.
